# Michael

> Builder, engineer, and writer building practical AI systems, products, and software.

Michael's portfolio documents practical AI systems, edge AI projects, workflow automation, software products, and technical writing. The site is maintained by Michael for readers, collaborators, recruiters, and AI agents that need a concise map of the most useful public pages.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://michaeltechs.xyz/): Overview of Michael's work, writing, and current focus.
- [About](https://michaeltechs.xyz/about): Background, skills, experience, and working style.
- [Work](https://michaeltechs.xyz/work): Case studies for AI systems, automation, computer vision, and software products.
- [Writing](https://michaeltechs.xyz/posts): Technical notes on AI engineering, system design, workflows, and production software.
- [Contact](https://michaeltechs.xyz/contact): Public ways to contact Michael.
- [Resume PDF](https://michaeltechs.xyz/Founder_BuiMinhCuong.pdf): Current resume file.

## Selected Work

- [MoYi Edge Translation](https://michaeltechs.xyz/work/moyi-edge-translation): Edge-first AI translation infrastructure for multilingual operations.
- [Sandora](https://michaeltechs.xyz/work/sandora): AI Department OS for virtual teams, automated workflows, and governed operations.
- [Dossier](https://michaeltechs.xyz/work/dossier): Agentic document intelligence for OCR, review, risk detection, and structured workflow automation.
- [EverDock Desktop](https://michaeltechs.xyz/work/everdock-desktop): Desktop-first AI workstation for coding agents, sessions, terminals, approvals, and remote execution.
- [Pharmaceutical QC Defect Detection Machine](https://michaeltechs.xyz/work/computer-vision-qc-system): Computer vision system for detecting pharmaceutical blister pack defects.
- [Autopilot and FSD - BFMC](https://michaeltechs.xyz/work/autonomous-vehicle-research): ROS autonomous driving stack for Bosch Future Mobility Challenge research.

## Selected Writing

- [AI Agents should not start with agents, but with workflows](https://michaeltechs.xyz/posts/ai-agent-start-with-workflow): Why agent projects should begin from real workflow mapping.
- [Designing a safe AI companion](https://michaeltechs.xyz/posts/ai-companion-safe-memory): Notes on memory, control, deletion, and human oversight for AI companions.
- [Snow AI Companion safety](https://michaeltechs.xyz/posts/snow-ai-companion-safety): Design considerations for child-safe AI companion products.
- [Why AI Engineers need to understand business workflows](https://michaeltechs.xyz/posts/ai-engineer-business-workflow): Connecting models, users, data, and business operations.

## Topics

- Practical AI systems and AI agents
- Edge AI, computer vision, and applied machine learning
- Workflow automation and software products
- Product engineering, technical writing, and case studies
